name: Chipotle Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt or to taste
2 pounds chicken drumettes, rinsed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chipotles in a medium bowl. Cover with boiling water and let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the chipotles.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
4. Puree the chipotles, garlic, tomato sauce, and lime juice in a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange chicken drumettes in a single layer in a baking pan and top each with chipotle sauce.
6. Bake, turning occasionally, until cooked through and golden, about 1 hour.
7. Stir together all dipping sauce ingredients in a small bowl. Serve the chicken with the sauce on the side.
